mapper.select: SELECT replyno, boardno, memberno, content, rdate, blind, parent_replyno FROM reply WHERE boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY replyno DESC

SELECT LEVEL AS lvl, r.replyno, r.boardno, r.memberno, r.content, r.blind, TO_CHAR(r.rdate,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rdate, m.id, m.nickname, m.profile FROM reply r INNER JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.boardno = #{boardno} START WITH r.parent_replyno IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR r.replyno = r.parent_replyno ORDER SIBLINGS BY r.rdate ASC

SELECT t.lvl, t.replyno, t.boardno, t.memberno, t.parent_replyno, t.content, t.blind, t.rdate, t.id, t.nickname, t.profile FROM ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl, r.replyno AS replyno, r.boardno AS boardno, r.memberno AS memberno, r.parent_replyno AS parent_replyno, r.content AS content, r.blind AS blind, TO_CHAR(r.rdate,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rdate, m.id AS id, m.nickname AS nickname, m.profile AS profile, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM reply r INNER JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.boardno = #{boardno} START WITH r.parent_replyno IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR r.replyno = r.parent_replyno ORDER SIBLINGS BY r.rdate DESC ) t WHERE t.rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE boardno = #{boardno}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET blind = #{blind} WHERE replyno = #{replyno}
mapper.select: SELECT LEVEL AS level, replyno, boardno, memberno, parent_replyno, content, blind, rdate FROM reply WHERE boardno = #{boardno} START WITH parent_replyno IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR replyno = parent_replyno ORDER SIBLINGS BY rdate ASC
